Gérez vos demandes de retours, rembourse: Manage your requests for returns, refunds, and package refusals.
Vous n'avez effectué aucune demande de r: You have not made any return requests. If you face an issue with an order (size, defect...), you can initiate a return from the order details.
Notre modèle de Paiement à la Livraison: Our Cash on Delivery model allows you to verify the package upon receipt. If an item does not match (size, model), report it immediately. Confirmed returns are refunded to your Olma Wallet for future use.
Aucun litige ou demande de retour active: No active disputes or return requests.
Uploadez la preuve de virement ou saisis: Upload bank transfer proof or enter URL.
Gérez les flux financiers et les paiemen: Manage financial flows and seller payments.
